title: AIDRA — Detection Map
description: GeoMap with vessel detections color-coded by confidence.

list.name: profile
list.label: Constraint Profile
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT constraint_profile FROM execution_log ORDER BY constraint_profile

list.name: model
list.label: Model
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT model_name || ' ' || model_version AS __text, model_name AS __value FROM execution_log ORDER BY model_name

list.name: include_land
list.label: Include on-land
list.description: Exclude detections falling on land by default (invariant I-DET-2).

list.name: include_anomaly
list.label: Include cluster anomalies
list.description: Exclude detections inside abnormally dense clusters by default (invariant I-DET-3).

list.name: quality
list.label: Quality verdict
list.description: Operational view defaults to valid sea targets. Use all/candidate/artifacts for audit.

list.name: api_base
list.label: API base URL
list.description: Public base URL of the AIDRA API. Override per deployment via ?var-api_base=... in the dashboard URL.

panels.title: Temporal coverage of the data shown
panels.description:
Summary of WHEN the vessels on the map were captured and WHEN AIDRA processed them.

• First scene / Last scene: timestamps at which the Sentinel-1 satellite acquired the SAR images (sensing date). This is the REAL moment the radar flew over the area. If a single scene is shown, both values match; if several passes are aggregated, they bound the temporal range.

• Scenes: number of distinct satellite passes / images aggregated on the map under the active filters.

• Last processed: when AIDRA downloaded and analysed the latest image (ran YOLO + CFAR, geocoded the detections and wrote them to the DB). This is pipeline time, not satellite time.

The gap between 'Last scene' and 'Last processed' is the END-TO-END LATENCY: how long the system takes from the satellite acquisition to the operator receiving actionable data. Key metric for maritime surveillance (SatCen tender criterion).

All values honour the active dashboard filters (profile, model, include on-land, include cluster anomalies, and the time range at the top right).

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
    COALESCE(to_char(MIN(e.image_sensing_date) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI UTC'), '—') AS "First scene",
    COALESCE(to_char(MAX(e.image_sensing_date) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI UTC'), '—') AS "Last scene",
    COUNT(DISTINCT e.id)::text AS "Scenes",
    COALESCE(to_char(MAX(e.created_at) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI UTC'), '—') AS "Last processed"
FROM detections d
JOIN execution_log e ON d.execution_id = e.id
WHERE e.created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
    AND e.status = 'success'
    AND ('$profile' = 'all' OR e.constraint_profile = '$profile')
    AND ('$model' = 'all' OR e.model_name = '$model')
    AND ('$include_land' = 'true' OR d.on_land = false)
    AND ('$include_anomaly' = 'true' OR d.cluster_anomaly = false)
    AND ('$quality' = 'all' OR d.quality_verdict = '$quality')

panels.title: Vessel detections
panels.description: Map with detection points color-coded by confidence level: green > 0.8, yellow > 0.5, red < 0.5.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
    ST_X(d.center_geo) AS longitude,
    ST_Y(d.center_geo) AS latitude,
    d.confidence,
    d.source,
    e.model_name,
    e.model_version,
    e.constraint_profile,
    e.image_sensing_date AS sensing_date,
    e.image_title,
    e.created_at AS "time"
FROM detections d
JOIN execution_log e ON d.execution_id = e.id
WHERE e.created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
    AND e.status = 'success'
    AND ('$profile' = 'all' OR e.constraint_profile = '$profile')
    AND ('$model' = 'all' OR e.model_name = '$model')
    AND ('$include_land' = 'true' OR d.on_land = false)
    AND ('$include_anomaly' = 'true' OR d.cluster_anomaly = false)
    AND ('$quality' = 'all' OR d.quality_verdict = '$quality')
ORDER BY e.created_at DESC

panels.title: Total detections
panels.description: Number of detections matching the active filters.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_detections
FROM detections d
JOIN execution_log e ON d.execution_id = e.id
WHERE e.created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
    AND e.status = 'success'
    AND ('$profile' = 'all' OR e.constraint_profile = '$profile')
    AND ('$model' = 'all' OR e.model_name = '$model')
    AND ('$include_land' = 'true' OR d.on_land = false)
    AND ('$include_anomaly' = 'true' OR d.cluster_anomaly = false)
    AND ('$quality' = 'all' OR d.quality_verdict = '$quality')

panels.title: Average confidence
panels.description: Mean detection confidence score across the active filters. Higher is better; YOLO scores between 0 and 1, CFAR is normalised to the same range.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT ROUND(AVG(d.confidence)::numeric, 3) AS avg_confidence
FROM detections d
JOIN execution_log e ON d.execution_id = e.id
WHERE e.created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
    AND e.status = 'success'
    AND ('$profile' = 'all' OR e.constraint_profile = '$profile')
    AND ('$model' = 'all' OR e.model_name = '$model')
    AND ('$include_land' = 'true' OR d.on_land = false)
    AND ('$include_anomaly' = 'true' OR d.cluster_anomaly = false)
    AND ('$quality' = 'all' OR d.quality_verdict = '$quality')

panels.title: Detections by source
panels.description: Breakdown of detections by detector: 'cfar' (statistical SAR detector), 'yolo' (deep learning) and 'fused' (overlapping detection confirmed by both).

targets.rawSql:
SELECT d.source, COUNT(*) AS count
FROM detections d
JOIN execution_log e ON d.execution_id = e.id
WHERE e.created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
    AND e.status = 'success'
    AND ('$profile' = 'all' OR e.constraint_profile = '$profile')
    AND ('$model' = 'all' OR e.model_name = '$model')
    AND ('$include_land' = 'true' OR d.on_land = false)
    AND ('$include_anomaly' = 'true' OR d.cluster_anomaly = false)
    AND ('$quality' = 'all' OR d.quality_verdict = '$quality')
GROUP BY d.source

panels.title: Pipeline runs in range
panels.description: Number of successful AIDRA pipeline executions in the selected time range. Each run processes one Sentinel-1 scene end-to-end.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT e.id) AS total_executions
FROM execution_log e
WHERE e.created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
    AND e.status = 'success'
    AND ('$profile' = 'all' OR e.constraint_profile = '$profile')
    AND ('$model' = 'all' OR e.model_name = '$model')

panels.title: Detection gallery (top confidence)
panels.description: Visual evidence per detection: actual SAR crop centred on the bounding box (log-stretched, percentile-clipped). Useful for the GEOINT analyst (visual proof of the vessel) and the AI Act auditor (explainability). Sorted by confidence; honours all dashboard filters.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
    '${api_base}/api/detections/' || d.id || '/thumbnail.png' AS "sar_crop",
    ROUND(d.confidence::numeric, 3)              AS "confidence",
    d.source                                     AS "source",
    ROUND(ST_Y(d.center_geo)::numeric, 4)        AS "lat",
    ROUND(ST_X(d.center_geo)::numeric, 4)        AS "lon",
    e.image_sensing_date                         AS "sensed_at",
    e.model_name                                 AS "model",
    e.constraint_profile                         AS "profile",
    d.id::text                                   AS "detection_id"
FROM detections d
JOIN execution_log e ON d.execution_id = e.id
WHERE e.created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
    AND e.status = 'success'
    AND ('$profile' = 'all' OR e.constraint_profile = '$profile')
    AND ('$model' = 'all' OR e.model_name = '$model')
    AND ('$include_land' = 'true' OR d.on_land = false)
    AND ('$include_anomaly' = 'true' OR d.cluster_anomaly = false)
    AND ('$quality' = 'all' OR d.quality_verdict = '$quality')
    AND d.thumbnail_path IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY d.confidence DESC
LIMIT 60

panels.title: Scenes processed (most recent first)
panels.description: One row per pipeline run. 'sensing_date' is when the Sentinel-1 satellite captured the image; 'processed_at' is when AIDRA analysed it. Their gap is the end-to-end latency. 'dur_s' is the run duration in seconds.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
    e.image_sensing_date AS "sensing_date",
    e.created_at         AS "processed_at",
    e.search_zone        AS "zone",
    e.image_title        AS "image",
    e.model_name         AS "model",
    e.constraint_profile AS "profile",
    e.num_detections     AS "detections",
    ROUND(e.avg_confidence::numeric, 3) AS "avg_conf",
    ROUND((e.total_duration_ms/1000.0)::numeric, 1) AS "dur_s",
    e.status
FROM execution_log e
WHERE e.created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
    AND e.status = 'success'
    AND ('$profile' = 'all' OR e.constraint_profile = '$profile')
    AND ('$model'   = 'all' OR e.model_name        = '$model')
ORDER BY e.image_sensing_date DESC NULLS LAST

panels.title: Tip & Cue chains (autonomous re-tasking)
panels.description: Each row is a re-tasking cue triggered by a previous low-confidence detection. The 'replay' link opens a side-by-side T0 → Cue → T1 visualisation with SAR thumbnails before/after and confidence uplift. This is the SatCen tender extra: shows how the satellite re-observes its own findings autonomously.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
    '${api_base}/api/tipcue/replay/' || t.id || '.html' AS "replay",
    t.created_at                                  AS "cue_at",
    t.status                                      AS "status",
    COALESCE(t.target_zone, '—')                  AS "zone",
    t.priority                                    AS "prio",
    cardinality(t.triggering_detections)          AS "trigger_dets",
    COALESCE(t.confirmed_detections, 0)           AS "confirmed",
    COALESCE(t.result_status, t.status)           AS "result",
    COALESCE(t.reason, '')                        AS "reason",
    t.id::text                                    AS "tasking_id"
FROM tasking_queue t
WHERE t.created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
ORDER BY t.created_at DESC
LIMIT 50
